name: Defense & Cyber
blurb: Naval Station Norfolk, the largest naval base in the world, anchors a deep ecosystem of defense contractors, cleared talent, and cyber operations across the 757.

name: Maritime & Shipbuilding
blurb: Newport News Shipbuilding builds nuclear carriers and submarines here. Shipyards, marine systems, and port logistics ship real steel — not just code.

name: Health Tech
blurb: Sentara Health, LifeNet Health, and a network of regional hospitals run software for clinical operations, regenerative medicine, and population health.

name: Logistics & Port
blurb: The Port of Virginia is one of the busiest ports on the East Coast. Supply chain, trucking, and intermodal tech move containers through here every day.

name: AI / Software
blurb: Local software houses, .NET shops, and AI/ML communities build products and services that ship from the 757 to clients across the country.
